changes.citation: backend/core/analytics/wave1_subsystem_evidence.py:27-38 — _WAVE1_CV_LIPID: 5 markers including tc_hdl_ratio (a ratio/derived marker). knowledge_bus/packages/pkg_lipid_transport/package_manifest.yaml:3-7 — description states 'threshold decision mandatory before implementation' and 'Clinical sign-off required'. tc_hdl_ratio requires ratio registry. More complex authority chain with multiple packages (pkg_lipid_transport, pkg_s24_ldl_high_dyslipidaemia, pkg_s24_triglycerides_high_metabolic). Glycaemic control is the safer, cleaner pilot choice.

backend/core/models/results.py:176-213 — SubsystemEvidenceV1 Pydantic model with ConfigDict(frozen=True, extra='forbid'). Current fields: subsystem_id (required), subsystem_label (required), included_marker_ids (default=[]), missing_marker_ids (default=[]), included_markers (Optional), missing_markers (Optional), status_label (Optional), evidence_role (Optional), source_trace (required). Fields required by card evidence schema (marker_role, relationship_kind, rationale_short, presence_policy, visibility_tier, mechanism_line, missing_policy_line, source_spec_ids, compile_manifest_ref) are ALL ABSENT — must be added as Optional with defaults in v2 DTO approach.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:387-402 — 10 test categories listed: (1) schema validation for card evidence artefact; (2) pilot artefact validation; (3) backend loader success path; (4) backend loader fail-closed behaviour; (5) pilot subsystem assembly using compiled evidence; (6) non-pilot subsystem behaviour unchanged; (7) DTO serialisation for new fields; (8) frontend render-only behaviour if touched; (9) regression that total_bilirubin not falsely reported missing; (10) regression that frontend/backend does not infer marker roles from names. STOP condition #4 (automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:413): 'Pilot artefact cannot validate' — schema validation is a hard gate before any backend/DTO/frontend work. STOP #8 prohibits frontend clinical inference. STOP #12 prohibits failing to prove pilot/non-pilot separation. Determinism is preserved: compiled YAML artefact is static, loader reads it at startup, no runtime LLM, no dynamic inference. Non-pilot subsystem behaviour unchanged by design (only pilot path wired through new loader).

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:405-421 — 14 STOP conditions cover all key creep vectors: missing authority files (#1), no safe pilot (#2), unresolved medical policy (#3), artefact validation failure (#4), raw investigation spec reads at runtime (#5), PSI runtime dependency (#6), broad contract redesign (#7), clinical inference in frontend (#8), bilirubin fix reintroduction (#9), root-cause/SignalRegistry changes (#10), scope beyond one pilot (#11), failing pilot/non-pilot separation (#12), helper script commits (#13), compile manifest carry-forward violations (#14).

Sprint touches domain_score_assembler.py (assembler integration) and adds backend card evidence loader — both are Intelligence Core components per SOP §3. Sprint explicitly prohibits modifying: root_cause_compiler_v1.py, signal_evaluator.py, SignalRegistry, scoring rails, insight_graph_builder.py, report_compiler_v1.py, signal_interaction_builder.py. The new loader is an additive path, not a mutation of existing engines. Non-pilot subsystems continue through existing assemble_wave1_subsystem_evidence() code path.

backend/core/models/results.py:176 — SubsystemEvidenceV1 has ConfigDict(frozen=True, extra='forbid'). Any new fields added in DTO v2 extension MUST be Optional with safe defaults. Required new fields (marker_role, relationship_kind, rationale_short, presence_policy, visibility_tier, mechanism_line, missing_policy_line, source_spec_ids, compile_manifest_ref) must all be Optional[str/list] = Field(default=None, ...) to avoid breaking existing serialisation. Existing test backend/tests/regression/test_domain_ux1c_governed_subsystem_evidence.py at line 18 imports SubsystemEvidenceV1 and tests existing fields — must remain passing.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:333-340 — backend loader requirements: 'not read raw investigation specs at runtime'. STOP #5: 'Backend implementation would require raw investigation spec runtime reads.' Loader must read only compiled YAML artefact from knowledge_bus/compiled/health_system_cards/. No imports of investigation spec path or loader at runtime. Cursor must confirm loader implementation has no reference to knowledge_bus/research/investigation_specs/ at runtime.

STOP #12 (automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:420): 'Tests cannot prove pilot/non-pilot separation.' The assembler integration must wire the compiled evidence path ONLY for the selected pilot subsystem_id. All other subsystems (e.g. wave1_cv_lipid_transport, wave1_cv_homocysteine_pathway, wave1_liv_enzyme_pattern, etc.) must continue using assemble_wave1_subsystem_evidence() unchanged. A test must confirm that a non-pilot domain (e.g. wave1_cardiovascular or wave1_liver) returns identical SubsystemEvidenceV1 rows before and after the sprint. STOP condition fires if this cannot be proven.

automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:363-386 — out-of-scope list explicitly prohibits: full card evidence estate regeneration; wiring all subsystems; modifying root-cause compiler; modifying root-cause YAML; modifying PSI artefacts; implementing PSI runtime wiring; modifying SignalRegistry; modifying SignalEvaluator; modifying SignalResult unless strictly required; modifying package files; modifying investigation specs; modifying biomarker SSOT; modifying scoring rails; modifying unit conversion; modifying clinical thresholds; creating compiled hypothesis artefacts; changing IDL copy; introducing fallback parsers; committing helper scripts.

New schema knowledge_bus/schema/health_system_card_evidence_schema_v1.yaml is a new authority, not a duplicate. wave1_subsystem_evidence.py remains the authority for non-pilot subsystems; compiled artefact becomes the authority for the pilot subsystem only — these are additive, not competing, authorities at this stage. ARCH-RT-3 pilot is a controlled vertical slice, not an estate-wide replacement.
